ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the product */,
  "breadth" INTEGER /* Breadth of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  "handle_height" INTEGER /* Height of the handle of the product */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently available for sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level before reordering */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the next restock */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is out of stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., Physical, Online) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Store's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Store's email address */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store's opening hours */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" TEXT /* Cost of the material per unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_material_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_material_mapping_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES product_materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_material_mapping_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., Thumbnail, High Resolution) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the return record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the return record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
